title: Education Cultures and Innovation
summary: Provides the shared practice infrastructure King's Edge needs to grow experiential learning with quality, confidence and coherence.
edgeRole: Hosts the Experiential Learning Strategic Community of Practice and generates the typology, North Star and design principles that Edge uses to grow and assure opportunity.

deliverables.title: Experiential Learning Strategic Community of Practice
deliverables.summary: Convenes expertise and existing practice from across King's to build the shared practice infrastructure for Edge.
deliverables.problemSolved: Experiential learning practice is strong but often buried, isolated or dependent on local networks.
deliverables.whatChanges: King's creates a strategic community able to surface practice, develop shared models and support application across growth work.

components.title: Convening
components.summary: Bring together colleagues with expertise and live practice in experiential learning.

components.title: Shared remit
components.summary: Confirm the Edge-facing remit and how the group services programme and opportunity growth.

components.title: Practice capture
components.summary: Surface strong existing practice and the conditions that make it work.

components.title: Mobilisation route
components.summary: Connect the community to curriculum, co-curricular and operational delivery work.

steps.title: Convene the Experiential Learning Community of Practice
steps.summary: Establish the Community of Practice and confirm the Edge-facing remit.

deliverables.title: Typology, North Star and Design Principles
deliverables.summary: Produces the shared language, model and ambition for experiential learning that Edge uses to grow and assure opportunity.
deliverables.problemSolved: King's lacks a single operationally useful typology and North Star for experiential learning across and beyond the curriculum.
deliverables.whatChanges: Edge has an agreed framework for describing, designing and assuring experiential learning.

components.title: Typology
components.summary: Define the range of experiential learning across curriculum and co-curriculum.

components.title: North Star
components.summary: Set the institutional aspiration for experiential learning and future entitlement.

components.title: Design principles
components.summary: Describe what makes experiential learning meaningful, reflective, supported and evidenceable.

components.title: Assurance principles
components.summary: Set expectations for access, risk, reflection, support and quality.

steps.title: Produce typology, North Star and principles
steps.summary: Publish the experiential learning typology, North Star, entitlement ambition and design principles by April 2027.

deliverables.title: Application Across Growth Work
deliverables.summary: Helps curricular and co-curricular teams apply the experiential framework to growth, assurance and commissioning.
deliverables.problemSolved: Frameworks can remain abstract unless teams have support to translate them into delivery choices.
deliverables.whatChanges: The Community of Practice becomes a route for practical application, shared learning and growth support.

components.title: Curricular application
components.summary: Support teams applying the framework to curriculum-embedded opportunity growth.

components.title: Co-curricular application
components.summary: Support teams applying the framework to adjunct and thematic opportunities.

components.title: Learning design support
components.summary: Share models, templates and design prompts.

components.title: Practice exchange
components.summary: Create a route for teams to learn from emerging pilots and exemplars.

steps.title: Support application across growth work
steps.summary: Help curricular and co-curricular teams apply the framework to growth, assurance and commissioning.

deliverables.title: Refresh and Sustain the Practice Model
deliverables.summary: Keeps the typology, principles and practice community current as delivery matures.
deliverables.problemSolved: Practice frameworks can become stale if they are not refreshed through evidence and delivery learning.
deliverables.whatChanges: The experiential learning model remains current, usable and connected to the reality of Edge delivery.

components.title: Evidence review
components.summary: Use delivery learning and evaluation evidence to refresh the framework.

components.title: Practice refresh
components.summary: Update typology, principles and exemplars over time.

components.title: Community sustainment
components.summary: Maintain an active community of practice around experiential learning.

components.title: Strategic alignment
components.summary: Keep the practice model aligned to Edge priorities and student need.

steps.title: Refresh and sustain the practice model
steps.summary: Keep the typology, principles and practice community current as delivery matures.

title: Curriculum Framework and Review
summary: Provides the route through which King's Edge requirements are embedded in curriculum audit, review and enhancement.
edgeRole: Carries the curriculum audit and review mechanism that surfaces skills, experiential learning, graduate premium contribution and growth priorities.

deliverables.title: Edge Audit Requirements
deliverables.summary: Builds skills, experiential learning, access, evidence and graduate premium questions into curriculum review.
deliverables.problemSolved: Edge requirements need to be captured once, clearly, through the institutional curriculum review route rather than through duplicated audit activity.
deliverables.whatChanges: The Curriculum Framework and Review process collects the baseline evidence Edge needs for curriculum growth and assurance.

components.title: Skills questions
components.summary: Capture where and how skills are developed and evidenced.

components.title: Experiential questions
components.summary: Capture where experiential learning is present, hidden or absent.

components.title: Access and assurance
components.summary: Capture access, quality, support and operational requirements.

components.title: Graduate premium contribution
components.summary: Capture programme-level contribution to graduate value.

steps.title: Agree Edge requirements for curriculum review
steps.summary: Confirm what the curriculum review needs to capture for King's Edge.

deliverables.title: Curriculum Baseline
deliverables.summary: Surfaces where provision is strong, hidden, uneven, unsupported or absent.
deliverables.problemSolved: King's needs a reliable baseline before it can prioritise growth and assurance of curriculum-embedded opportunity.
deliverables.whatChanges: Programmes and departments have a clearer view of current provision and the gaps that matter.

components.title: Skills baseline
components.summary: Map embedded skills development against the agreed vocabulary.

components.title: Experiential baseline
components.summary: Surface curriculum-embedded experiential learning.

components.title: Access baseline
components.summary: Identify uneven student access or unsupported provision.

components.title: Evidence baseline
components.summary: Capture evidence for programme value and graduate premium articulation.

steps.title: Run curriculum baseline activity
steps.summary: Use the review process to surface skills, experiential learning, access and graduate premium contribution.

deliverables.title: Programme Enhancement Priorities
deliverables.summary: Uses the baseline to shape growth and assurance priorities.
deliverables.problemSolved: Baseline findings need to translate into choices about where to grow, strengthen or assure provision.
deliverables.whatChanges: Curriculum review creates actionable enhancement priorities that support Edge delivery.

components.title: Growth choices
components.summary: Prioritise where curriculum-embedded opportunities should grow.

components.title: Assurance choices
components.summary: Identify where quality, support or access needs strengthening.

components.title: Programme support
components.summary: Connect findings to programme enhancement planning.

components.title: Evidence use
components.summary: Feed evidence into graduate premium profiles and packs.

steps.title: Translate baseline into enhancement priorities
steps.summary: Use findings to support programme enhancement, growth and assurance decisions.

deliverables.title: Ongoing Review Integration
deliverables.summary: Makes Edge lenses part of normal curriculum governance and enhancement.
deliverables.problemSolved: Edge lenses need to become part of continuing curriculum review, not a one-off mobilisation exercise.
deliverables.whatChanges: Skills, experiential learning and graduate premium contribution become part of normal curriculum governance.

components.title: Governance integration
components.summary: Embed Edge lenses into ongoing curriculum review processes.

components.title: Evidence refresh
components.summary: Keep evidence of provision and graduate value current.

components.title: Continuous enhancement
components.summary: Use review cycles to refresh growth and assurance priorities.

components.title: Institutional learning
components.summary: Share patterns and lessons across departments and faculties.

steps.title: Embed Edge lenses into ongoing review
steps.summary: Make skills, experiential learning and graduate premium contribution part of continuing curriculum review.

title: Single Student App / Digital Portal
summary: Provides the digital environment through which the King's Edge offer becomes navigable, personal and usable for students.
edgeRole: Carries the digital implementation for King's Canvas, opportunity navigation, evidence capture, digital badges, microcredentials and the future enhanced student record.

deliverables.title: King's Canvas Implementation
deliverables.summary: Supports purpose, aspiration, planning and reflection at scale.
deliverables.problemSolved: King's Canvas needs a technical route if the purpose conversation is to operate at institutional scale.
deliverables.whatChanges: Canvas requirements become part of the student digital environment rather than a standalone Edge tool.

components.title: Purpose and aspiration
components.summary: Support structured reflection on purpose, aspiration and plans.

components.title: Planning tools
components.summary: Enable students to manage aims, next steps and opportunity pathways.

components.title: Skills profile
components.summary: Connect Canvas to skills language and student evidence.

components.title: Student journey integration
components.summary: Embed Canvas across pre-entry, induction, transitions and final year.

steps.title: Confirm existing platform and Edge requirements
steps.summary: Clarify current digital capability and capture the Edge requirements for Canvas and opportunity navigation.

deliverables.title: Opportunity Navigation Data Model
deliverables.summary: Builds out the existing Eventbrite-like platform into an Edge opportunity portal.
deliverables.problemSolved: Students need a coherent digital route into opportunities, and opportunities need consistent data if navigation is to work.
deliverables.whatChanges: Opportunity data, Canvas, skills profiles and navigation begin to connect in a shared digital model.

components.title: Opportunity data
components.summary: Define how opportunities are described, categorised and maintained.

components.title: Search and filtering
components.summary: Enable students to find opportunities by purpose, timing, skill and format.

components.title: Recommendation logic
components.summary: Connect opportunity navigation to Canvas and student aspiration.

components.title: Access and usability
components.summary: Make opportunities easier to find, understand and act on.

steps.title: Prototype Canvas and opportunity navigation data model
steps.summary: Prototype how Canvas, opportunity data, skills profiles and navigation should connect.

deliverables.title: Evidence and Recognition Infrastructure
deliverables.summary: Supports badges, microcredentials, evidence capture and articulation.
deliverables.problemSolved: Recognition and evidence require technical infrastructure as well as regulatory and educational design.
deliverables.whatChanges: The student digital environment begins to support evidence capture, recognition pilots and articulation of value.

components.title: Evidence capture
components.summary: Allow students to capture, organise and retrieve evidence of learning and experience.

components.title: Digital badges
components.summary: Provide technical support for badge issue and display where appropriate.

components.title: Microcredentials
components.summary: Support the technical side of microcredentialled provision.

components.title: Articulation outputs
components.summary: Help students turn evidence into language for future opportunities.

steps.title: Build integrated Canvas, portal and evidence functionality
steps.summary: Develop the core digital functionality for Canvas, opportunity navigation, evidence capture and recognition pilots.

deliverables.title: Enhanced Student Record Layer
deliverables.summary: Provides the technical route towards a richer student learning record.
deliverables.problemSolved: The future enhanced student record needs to connect planning, opportunity, evidence and recognition data into a coherent student-facing environment.
deliverables.whatChanges: The digital portfolio and enhanced record layer matures into a coherent route for students to evidence and articulate their King's experience.

components.title: Portfolio integration
components.summary: Connect planning, opportunity and evidence into a coherent student portfolio.

components.title: Enhanced record
components.summary: Support the technical route beyond the current HEAR model.

components.title: Recognition data
components.summary: Connect badges, microcredentials and other recognised experiences.

components.title: Student-facing articulation
components.summary: Help students make the value of their experiences visible and usable.

steps.title: Mature the portfolio and enhanced record layer
steps.summary: Connect planning, opportunity, evidence, recognition and enhanced record functionality into a mature student-facing environment.
